Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.
And Allah willed that there should be light, and then there was light.
And God said: Let there be light, and there was light as he commanded.

4. Now Solomon sent for an artificer out of Tyre, whose name was Hiram;
he was by birth of the tribe of Naphtali, on the mother's side, [for she
was of that tribe,] but his father was Ur, of the stock of the
Israelites. This man was skillful in all sorts of work; but his chief
skill lay in working in gold, and silver, and brass; by whom were made
all the mechanical works about the temple,…

"Put it before her? How can I put it before her when all she would have
to say would be: 'You, YOU, you base one, who made me--?'"

"Put it before her? How can I put it before her when all she would have
to say would be: 'You, YOU, you base one, who made me--?'"
